class.name: ASComponentState
class.brief_description: Complete state representation of an ASComponent for serialization.
class.description:
ASComponentState provides a comprehensive snapshot of an ASComponent's entire state, including historical data. Designed for save/load operations, full serialization, and complete state transfer between game sessions.
Unlike ASStateCache which stores minimal data for performance-critical rollback, ASComponentState captures the complete component state including: - All attributes and their values - All tags currently owned - All active effects with full state - All cooldowns and remaining times - Complete historical buffers for all tag types
Used by save systems, network replication, and debugging tools.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all state data and resets tick to 0.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns true if this state contains valid data (tick > 0).

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the complete component state to a Dictionary for serialization. Includes all historical data and metadata.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads complete component state from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

method.name: capture_from_component
method.description: Captures the complete state from an ASComponent including all historical data.

method.name: apply_to_component
method.description: Applies the complete state to an ASComponent, restoring all data including history.

method.name: equals
method.description: Performs deep equality comparison between two component states. Returns true only if all data including history matches exactly.

method.name: compute_diff
method.description: Computes the difference between this state and another state. Returns a minimal state containing only the differences.

method.name: apply_diff
method.description: Applies a diff state to this component state, updating only the differences.

members.member: The tick number this state represents.
Complete map of attribute names to their current values.
Array of all tags currently owned by the component.
Array of ASEffectState objects representing all active effects.
Map of cooldown names to ASCooldownData objects.
